title: chore(deps): update dependency enzyme-adapter-preact-pure to v2.3.0

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [enzyme-adapter-preact-pure](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure) | [`2.2.0` -> `2.3.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.2.0/2.3.0) | [![age](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.3.0/age-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.3.0/adoption-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.3.0/compatibility-slim/2.2.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.3.0/confidence-slim/2.2.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure</summary>

### [`v2.3.0`](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/releases/v2.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/compare/v2.2.3...v2.3.0)

*nb. This was intended to have been a patch rather than minor release.*

-   Fix error when setting certain event properties when calling `simulate()` in an environment that uses JSDOM [#​125](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/pull/125)

### [`v2.2.3`](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​223---2020-08-11)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/compare/v2.2.2...v2.2.3)

-   Fix a regression in 2.2.1 when a component that is stubbed out during shallow
    rendering is passed a number as a child [#​120](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/pull/120)

### [`v2.2.2`](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​222---2020-08-08)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/compare/v2.2.1...v2.2.2)

-   Fix a regression in 2.2.1 when a component that is stubbed out during shallow
    rendering is passed multiple children [#​119](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/pull/119)

### [`v2.2.1`](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​221---2020-07-19)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/compare/v2.2.0...v2.2.1)

-   Fix exception when shallow rendering a component that uses the "render prop"
    pattern [#​107](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/pull/107).

</details>

---
